Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Represents a media asset like a custom text slide, image URL, video URL, or webpage embedding

url.description: Direct link or external embedding URL

content.description: For text media: announcement body or bulletin message

config.description: Custom configuration including layout colors and alignments

duration.description: Default slide display duration in seconds

ownerId.description: The administrative creator of this asset

Playlist.title: Playlist
Playlist.description: An ordered sequence of assets configured to run sequentially on TV Player

items.description: Array of assets snapshots including sequence duration settings

ownerId.description: The administrative creator of this playlist

Screen.title: Screen
Screen.description: Represents a Smart TV player display and its pairing registration state

pairingCode.description: Short code used by browser screens to request a link

lastActive.description: Server Timestamp recording the last player heartbeat

contentId.description: The specific playlist id or asset id assigned to run

pairedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the screen was paired

ownerId.description: User instance belonging. Empty string prior to pairing link

clientId.description: A reference to the registered Client business establishment document ID

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a registered client business establishment

planId.description: References the acquired plan ID (e.g. plan_1)

Plan.title: Plan
Plan.description: Represents a tiered pricing plan from 1 to 7 with custom max display configurations

price.description: The custom price set by the admin, or null/empty if not yet determined

maxScreens.description: The maximum number of screens allowed on this plan level

/assets/{assetId}.description: Stores user uploaded or customized signage media assets

/playlists/{playlistId}.description: Stores sequences of media playlist timings

/screens/{screenId}.description: Stores TV players and browser display pairings

/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores registered clients under administration control

/plans/{planId}.description: Stores client subscription tiers and standard pricing limits
